Post.title: Post
Post.description: A post containing an image and text, part of a specific board.

text.description: The textual content of the post.

imageModels.description: The AI model used to generate each image.

boardId.description: The ID of the board this post belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the post was last updated.

Board.title: Board
Board.description: A category or collection of posts.

name.description: The display name of the board.

order.description: The display order of the board.

locked.description: Whether the board is locked for premium/active users only.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Global settings for trial periods and licensing.

allFree.description: Whether full access is temporarily gifted to everyone.

License.title: License
License.description: User subscription and trial license record.

activated.description: True if user activated full version.

trialStartDate.description: Timestamp when user first logged in.

activatedAt.description: Timestamp when activation code was entered.

RecycleBinItem.title: RecycleBinItem
RecycleBinItem.description: A deleted post, board, or prompt moved to the recycle bin.

deletedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was moved to the recycle bin.

deletedFrom.description: Where the item was deleted from (e.g. board name or Prompt Builder).

data.description: The payload data of the deleted item.

/settings/{settingsId}.description: Global settings for trial periods and licensing.

/licenses/{licenseId}.description: User trial and activation license documents.
